name: pty
summary: POSIX pseudo-terminal bindings — open a PTY, fork a subprocess, relay its I/O.
use_when: User wants to embed a subprocess terminal inside an SDL or graphical window
User needs to run a program and capture its stdin/stdout as a terminal stream
User says 'terminal emulator', 'embed REPL', 'run subprocess in window'
avoid_when: User wants simple subprocess output without terminal emulation (use popen/stdio)
User is on Windows (POSIX PTY not available)
